preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. What is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: With Pass Without a Trace? 43.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So you're back where you were. The rest of you, what are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS PERKINS
preceding_turns.text: Well, he's a mad little one, isn't he?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's not usually little. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to go around the column, and around the edge of the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This opens up slightly more, and you get to see a portion of the mineral growth-- a lot of the moisture that has coalesced into the ceiling has come into a central point, and over time, it just built up these central columns of rock and natural materials. A few pools have gathered towards the base. You see portions of the ground where elements of the acrid liquid that filled the pool over here just dripped in. Whether they began this way or turned by the dragon's presence, you are unaware. But that's as far as you can see.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Further along the wall, that little rock-- yeah. And just a little bit past it. And then closer to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, you can make out that additional pool of acid, the far back corner and a risen platform, you see the portion of the cavernous stone beginning to mass into a higher level towards the far back corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I listen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 20. You listen in... Silence. Stillness. The very faint whisper of wind far behind you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Around the entire wall. Further, past that pool of acid, even. Further corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Has it been a minute yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: About half a minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you come around this corner, being as careful as you can, looking around you-- (impact). Your shoulder hits something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Stab.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So that ends your turn. Everyone else, I need you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you've still got Uncanny Dodge on one of the attacks. Just from your roguish instincts.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Displacer Cloak.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. It gets disadvantage on the first attack, which is going to be a bite. That's a natural 19, and a two! With the two, that brings it to a 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So with that, you (whoosh) see for a split second, the ripple of teeth snap before you, missing your face by mere inches before they disappear once again. Two more claws (whoosh) towards you. The first one, that's a 19 again and a seven. That's going to be a 22.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just hits. Uncanny Dodge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, your AC would be 20 because you're not hasted right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you're right. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So that would put you at 18 points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Halved to nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Halved to nine. Also your displacement is gone from your cloak.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: For this round?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. For the next attack, it's a 19. Misses you? 20? Yeah. The second claw swings through, at this point, from the pain of the first strike of the dragon claw hits you, you back up to the very edge of the cave and duck out of the way as you hear the wind change. As you do, you hear the stone crash behind you as the claw misses you, slamming instead to the side of the cavern wall. It's now your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stay right here. I'm going to hold my turn until one of my friends is on top of this thing and then I'm going to stab it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hold your action until one of your friends is on it and then you move? Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Not on it, but against it, attacking it. Melee attack.
